property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Users\User\.jdks\openjdk-25\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\PowerShell\7;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.9.10-hotspot\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Python313\python.exe;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\PowerShell\7\;C:\Users\User\.jdks\openjdk-25\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Python313\;C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\;C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\User\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Python313\python.exe;C:\Program Files\Sublime Text;C:\Users\User\.jdks\openjdk-25\bin;C:\Program Files\maven-mvnd-1.0.3-windows-amd64\maven-mvnd-1.0.3-windows-amd64\bin;C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Programs\Windsurf\bin;C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Programs\Ollama;C:\Users\User\.dotnet\tools;C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Programs\Zed\bin;.

testcase.name: byzantineEquivocatingLeaderStillMakesProgress
testcase.system-out: [UdpTransport] Started on port 5000 [FL] Node 0 started on port 5000 [SL] Node 0 started [PL] Node 0 started [APL] Node 0 started with authentication [Node 0] Started on port 5000 (leader for view 0 is 0, behavior=EQUIVOCATE_LEADER) [UdpTransport] Started on port 5001 [FL] Node 1 started on port 5001 [SL] Node 1 started [PL] Node 1 started [APL] Node 1 started with authentication [Node 1] Started on port 5001 (leader for view 0 is 0, behavior=HONEST) [UdpTransport] Started on port 5002 [FL] Node 2 started on port 5002 [SL] Node 2 started [PL] Node 2 started [APL] Node 2 started with authentication [Node 2] Started on port 5002 (leader for view 0 is 0, behavior=HONEST) [UdpTransport] Started on port 5003 [FL] Node 3 started on port 5003 [SL] Node 3 started [PL] Node 3 started [APL] Node 3 started with authentication [Node 3] Started on port 5003 (leader for view 0 is 0, behavior=HONEST) [Client 203] Started on port 6203 [Client 203] Sent request b62149af-56c5-49ba-8399-f72afdf4df37 to Node 0 [Client 203] Sent request b62149af-56c5-49ba-8399-f72afdf4df37 to Node 1 [Client 203] Sent request b62149af-56c5-49ba-8399-f72afdf4df37 to Node 2 [Client 203] Sent request b62149af-56c5-49ba-8399-f72afdf4df37 to Node 3 [Node 1] Moved to view 1 (timeout) [Node 2] Moved to view 1 (timeout) [Node 0] Moved to view 1 (timeout) [Node 3] Moved to view 1 (timeout) [Node 0] Appended to blockchain: test-byz-equiv-1 [Node 2] Appended to blockchain: test-byz-equiv-1 [Node 0] Moved to view 2 (block decided) [Node 2] Moved to view 2 (block decided) [Node 1] Appended to blockchain: test-byz-equiv-1 [Node 1] Moved to view 2 (block decided) [Node 3] Appended to blockchain: test-byz-equiv-1 [Node 3] Moved to view 2 (block decided) [Client 203] Reply from node 0 (view 1): Committed in view 1 [Client 203] Stopped [Node 0] Stopped [Node 1] Stopped [Node 2] Stopped [Node 3] Stopped

testcase.name: invalidVoteSignatureByzantineNodeDoesNotBreakConsensus

testcase.name: invalidNodeSignatureIsRejected
testcase.system-out: [UdpTransport] Started on port 5002 [FL] Node 2 started on port 5002 [SL] Node 2 started [PL] Node 2 started [APL] Node 2 started with authentication [Node 2] Started on port 5002 (leader for view 6 is 2, behavior=HONEST) [Node 2] Stopped
testcase.system-err: Signature verification failed: Bad signature length: got 6 but was expecting 256 [APL] Invalid signature from node 1, dropping message

testcase.name: timeoutViewChangeSurvivesLeaderCrash
